/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -march=native -mtune=native -pthread CMakeFiles/optimize_anf.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimize_anf.dir/src/circuit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimize_anf.dir/src/truth_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimize_anf.dir/src/moebius.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimize_anf.dir/src/walsh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimize_anf.dir/src/gf2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimize_anf.dir/src/anf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimize_anf.dir/src/affine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimize_anf.dir/src/search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimize_anf.dir/src/io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optimize_anf.dir/src/verify.cpp.o -o optimize_anf
